items.name: Wishkeeper Bag | Chocolate Ganache
items.description:
No fairytale would be complete without the perfect handbag fit for a princess or a prince ever so charming! Complete your story with this piece of eye candy that comes in 4 beyond delicious colors, and don't worry - your wishes are safe with us! ❤ Write your own fairytale and give our kingdom a visit for more delicious items: https://www.roblox.com/groups/33661703/I-LOVE-POODLE#!/store

Other scrumptious color variations!

https://www.roblox.com/catalog/15897252275/Wishkeeper-Bag-Grape-Dusk - Purple Dusk

items.name: The Glorious Spirit Glide
items.description: This sled is a symbol of prestige, awarded only to players who have demonstrated their worth. Its elegant curves and intricate patterns symbolize the magic and protection of the Christmas spirits. Riding this sled offers an experience akin to embarking on a mystical journey from ancient legends.
